text:
On Sun, 03 Feb 2008 15:45:15 -0600, Stacey Roberts  =

<stacey@vickiandstacey.com> wrote:

> Hi Mezz,
>    Good to hear from you..,
>
> On Sun, 03 Feb 2008, Jeremy Messenger wrote:
>
>>  Today, I just finished did the clean installation of desktop (includ=
ed
>>  linux-opera) and I can't reproduce it. Do you have Linux emulation  =

>> enable?
>>
>
> I would have thought so..,
>
> I've rechecked the manual again, and am trying to see if specifically
> including "options COMPAT_LINUX" into the kernel helps..,
>
> buildkernel running at the moment.

You can load linux module (kldload linux) instead for more quicker. I ha=
ve  =

linux_enable=3D"YES" in my /etc/rc.conf.

Cheers,
Mezz

> Thanks.
>
> Regards,
>
> S Roberts
>
>>  Cheers,
>>  Mezz
